import React, { useState } from 'react' import Head from 'next/head' import raceDayCalc from './api/raceDayCalc' const About = () => { const [ raceDay, setRaceDay ] = useState("Jan 01, 2020") const [ raceDayFinal, setRaceDayFinal ] = useState('') const raceDayStart = (e) => { e.preventDefault() setRaceDayFinal(raceDayCalc(raceDay)) } return(
About
setRaceDay(e.target.value)}>

Your race will be on {raceDayFinal[0]}

) } export default About
